title: Gruffalo Mouse 9 inch
features: Cuddly soft toy of the Mouse character from the Gruffalo story book
Soft legs do not enable Mouse to stand unsupported
description: Product Description This is the 9 inch size Mouse character from the hugely popular Gruffalo book and film written by Julia Donaldson and illustrated by Axel Scheffler. The Mouse is so soft, cute and cuddly and now you can take them everywhere with you and love. Also available in 7 inch and 16 inch sizes. Choking hazard - small parts - not for children under 3 years. Surface washable / all new materials / polyester fibres age: 3+. Approx. 9 inches top to bottom, not in sitting pose. Safety Warning Suitable from 36 months Box Contains 1 x Aurora World Gruffalo Mouse 9In See more
